scope_summary.problem: No automated spec format/content validation exists. Manual review found 13 content gaps + 7 format violations in #1136 specs. → requirements.md § R1-R6
scope_summary.success_criteria: 1. `cclab sdd check-alignment` CLI command validates spec files. 2. Format rules: missing annotations, duplicate sections, missing spec-lang blocks. 3. Logical rules: duplicate definitions, field name conflicts, schema conflicts. 4. Zero false positives. 5. Exit code 0 on clean, non-zero on violations. → pre_clarifications Q1-Q2

constraints: Follows validate-spec-structure pattern (Violation struct, --json flag, exit codes)
Prose is allowed — check is for spec-lang block presence, not prose absence
